training_data.primary_source: Web corpus + curated datasets + Constitutional AI training
training_data.notes: Anthropic has not released detailed training data composition. Constitutional AI training may reduce explicit bias but does not address structural training data underrepresentation.

behavioral_profile.funding_bias: More balanced than GPT-4o but still defaults to Western funding bodies
behavioral_profile.career_bias: Slightly more nuanced but Western career templates dominate
behavioral_profile.tone_pattern: More respectful tone, lower unsolicited inference rate
behavioral_profile.notes: Claude shows better LLS scores than GPT-4o and Gemini — fewer instances of unprompted deficit framing. However RAS scores remain low — resource suggestions are still predominantly Western.

cdi_preliminary.status: preliminary — to be updated after 54-prompt stress test
